name: merkle audit log: each entry includes prev_hash linking to the canonical hash of the previous line (Merkle chain)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event a --actor t --data {} && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event b --actor t --data {} && tail -1 .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl | grep -E "prev_hash.*sha256:[a-f0-9]+" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
